case_title: LAKEWOOD CONSTRUCTION SPECIALTIES VS DOERR, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO JOHN DOERR RETURNED--NO MAIL RECEPTACLE
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOERR, JOHN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAKEWOOD CONSTRUCTION SPECIALTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOERR, JOHN CAL TECH STORE FIXTURES, INC. $4,867.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,887.00, JOHN DOERR IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
